channel.title: Intel Newsroom
channel.description: The latest news and announcements from Intel.

item.title: New Smart City Pilot Network to Bridge Digital Divide for 50 U.S. Cities
item.dc:creator: Daniela Morescalchi
item.description: Intel today announced a pilot network spanning 50 U.S. cities, with more details on the rollout…

item.title: Intel Foundry Adds Two New Customers to Advanced Packaging Program
item.dc:creator: Press Team
item.description: Two additional customers have signed on to Intel Foundry’s advanced packaging program…
